ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Los Angeles, Cook) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the region is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the region's centroid */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the region's centroid */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region (population per square mile) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the region's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of demographic data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area size in square miles */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population in the region */,
  "percent_age_18" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 18 and over */,
  "percent_age_65" REAL /* Percentage of population aged 65 and over */,
  "documentation" TEXT /* Link to documentation or metadata for the data record */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "gender_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of males to females */,
  "ethnicity_distribution" TEXT /* Distribution of different ethnicities (JSON format) */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "socioeconomic_factors" (
  "socio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each socioeconomic record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated region */,
  "docs" INTEGER /* Number of documented facilities in the region */,
  "beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds available in local facilities */,
  "crimes" INTEGER /* Total reported crimes in the region */,
  "highschool_grads" REAL /* Percentage of high school graduates */,
  "bachelor_grads" REAL /* Percentage of bachelor's degree graduates */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate in percentage */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in percentage */,
  "per_capita_income" INTEGER /* Per capita income amount */,
  "total_income" INTEGER /* Total income for the region */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the region */,
  "employment_by_sector" TEXT /* Employment distribution by sector (JSON format) */,
  "healthcare_quality" REAL /* Score or rating for healthcare quality in the region */,
  "education_quality" REAL /* Score or rating for education quality in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the socioeconomic data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("socio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_socioeconomic_factors_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region associated with the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic, socioeconomic, combined) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated region */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data represented (e.g., demographic, socioeconomic) */,
  "schema_version" TEXT /* Version of the data schema */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., census, survey) */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Brief description of the methodology used to collect the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated region */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created this version */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was taken */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region related to the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was taken */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for the action */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the audit trail entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
